name: Alerts Over Time By Severity
description: This visual shows the number of alerts over time split by severity - useful to identify trends in alert severity over time.. Informational alerts are excluded from this graph.

name: Top allowed traffic by port
description: This visualization shows the most frequently used network ports for allowed traffic, ranked by the number of connections. It helps identify common services and communication patterns within the environment, making it easier to spot unusual or unexpected port usage that could indicate misconfigurations or potential security risks.

name: Top allowed traffic by port
